choose.when: AND r.RVW_USE_YN = 'N' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT Rpt WHERE Rpt.RPT_REVIEW_NO = r.RVW_NO AND Rpt.RPT_STATUS_CD != 'RST004') < 5
AND r.RVW_USE_YN = 'N' AND (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REPORT Rpt WHERE Rpt.RPT_REVIEW_NO = r.RVW_NO AND Rpt.RPT_STATUS_CD != 'RST004') >= 5

mapper.select:
SELECT r.RVW_NO AS rvwNo, r.RVW_PLC_NO AS rvwPlcNo, r.RVW_MBR_ID AS rvwMbrId, r.RVW_RATING AS rvwRating, r.RVW_CONTENT AS rvwContent, DATE_FORMAT(r.RVW_REG_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') AS rvwRegDate, r.RVW_USE_YN AS rvwUseYn, m.MBR_NICKNAME AS nickname, p.PLC_NAME AS plcName, p.PLC_RGN_CD AS plcRgnCd, p.PLC_CAT_CD AS plcCatCd FROM REVIEW r JOIN MEMBER m ON r.RVW_MBR_ID = m.MBR_ID JOIN PLACE p ON r.RVW_PLC_NO = p.PLC_NO WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY r.RVW_NO DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{size}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REVIEW r JOIN MEMBER m ON r.RVW_MBR_ID = m.MBR_ID JOIN PLACE p ON r.RVW_PLC_NO = p.PLC_NO WHERE 1=1
SELECT RVW_PLC_NO FROM REVIEW WHERE RVW_NO = #{rvwNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REVIEW (RVW_PLC_NO, RVW_MBR_ID, RVW_RATING, RVW_CONTENT, RVW_REG_DATE) VALUES (#{rvwPlcNo}, #{rvwMbrId}, #{rvwRating}, #{rvwContent}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE REVIEW SET RVW_RATING = #{rvwRating}, RVW_CONTENT = #{rvwContent}, RVW_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE RVW_NO = #{rvwNo} AND RVW_MBR_ID = #{rvwMbrId} AND RVW_USE_YN = 'Y'
UPDATE REVIEW SET RVW_USE_YN = 'N', RVW_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE RVW_NO = #{rvwNo} AND RVW_MBR_ID = #{rvwMbrId} AND RVW_USE_YN = 'Y'

UPDATE PLACE SET PLC_AVG_RATING = (SELECT COALESCE(ROUND(AVG(RVW_RATING), 1), 0.0) FROM REVIEW WHERE RVW_PLC_NO = #{plcNo} AND RVW_USE_YN = 'Y'), PLC_REVIEW_CNT = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REVIEW WHERE RVW_PLC_NO = #{plcNo} AND RVW_USE_YN = 'Y'), PLC_UP_DATE = NOW() WHERE PLC_NO = #{plcNo}
mapper.select: SELECT r.RVW_NO AS rvwNo, r.RVW_PLC_NO AS rvwPlcNo, r.RVW_MBR_ID AS rvwMbrId, r.RVW_RATING AS rvwRating, r.RVW_CONTENT AS rvwContent, r.RVW_REG_DATE AS rvwRegDate, m.MBR_NICKNAME AS nickname FROM REVIEW r JOIN MEMBER m ON r.RVW_MBR_ID = m.MBR_ID WHERE r.RVW_PLC_NO = #{plcNo} AND r.RVW_USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY r.RVW_REG_DATE DESC
